mode: so the default mode will be a1(delete this)
compress_summary_prompt:
Provide a detailed summary of the previous conversation for continuing in a new session.

The new session will not have access to the original conversation history, so preserve all context needed to continue seamlessly.

Focus on:
- Key topics discussed and why they matter
- Important decisions made and their reasoning
- Current work in progress and its state
- Next steps or open questions to address
- The participants in the conversation, especially recurring group members, and their speaking style, personality, preferences, habits, and relationship dynamics
- Stable details that help imitate the established tone when continuing to talk with those same people later
- Any relevant technical details, code snippets, or configurations mentioned

Requirements:
1. Write in the original conversation language
2. Be concise but complete — do not omit important context
3. Output the summary directly without prefaces or meta-commentary
4. Start with a clear indicator (e.g., "[Summary of previous conversation]" or equivalent)
5. Preserve user-by-user memory when possible: if different people have distinct tones or repeated viewpoints, describe them separately so the assistant can continue interacting naturally after compression

Summarize the conversation above directly.
compress_recent_rounds_comment: How many recent conversation rounds to keep after compression. 10 means keep the latest 20 messages: 10 user + 10 assistant (delete this line)
record_group_messages_comment: If true, group messages that do not wake the bot will be stored as passive context (delete this line)
reply_on_at_comment: If true, [CQ:at,qq=bot] wakes the bot even without .ai (delete this line)
reply_on_keyword_comment: If true, wake_keywords also wake the bot. Default false to avoid accidental replies (delete this line)
group_context_summary_prompt: Summarize the recent group conversation in the original conversation language, so the assistant can keep enough context for later replies. Preserve topic flow, participants, unresolved questions, tone, and references likely to matter next. Output concise summary only.
group_context_keep_lines_comment: When the bot is about to reply, compress older passive group context into summary and keep this many newest passive group-context lines (delete this line)
group_context_include_lines_comment: Include this many newest passive group-context lines in the next model request. For DeepSeek prefix cache, request order is mode prompt -> active history -> group summary -> recent group lines -> current user (delete this line)
MAX_REPLY_comment: context will be trimed when prompt_tokens > MAX_TOKEN - MAX_TOKEN - MAX_REPLY (delete this)
RED_LINE_comment: context will be conpressed when prompt_tokens > MAX_TOKEN - RED_LINE (delete this)
op: This means the user(QQ ID) can do op operation(delete this line)
black_list: Words in here will be replaced with __
